summary: Published the meeting-followup runx skill to GitHub and the hosted registry, opened PR #249 against runxhq/runx, ran a dogfood invocation from the hosted registry that sealed successfully with 2 action items, verified the receipt, and assembled full evidence for Frantic bounty #76.
observations: The skill was published to the hosted runx registry at armstrongsam25/meeting-followup with version sha-b66fb56c9dfe and harness status passed (2/2 cases).
Both harness cases passed on the hosted registry: sealed_action_items_extracted (expected status sealed) and stop_no_action_items (expected status failure).
The standalone source repository was created at https://github.com/armstrongsam25/runx-meeting-followup-skill and pushed to the master branch.
A pull request was opened against runxhq/runx at https://github.com/runxhq/runx/pull/249 on branch skill/meeting-followup targeting main.

The dogfood invocation from the hosted registry returned status sealed with exit_code 0 and extracted 2 action items (Alice: send proposal by Friday, Bob: review budget by EOW), both resolved to due_date 2026-07-10.

The sealed receipt sha256:6ce2d339d5fdd3eadba56af66bd986235a5ecba16407d6821f3c2637f2a5420d was verified with runx verify --receipt --json: valid true, digest valid, content_address valid, signature valid (Ed25519, kid runx-demo-key).

The skill is read-only and side-effect free: it parses meeting notes into structured action_items and never writes to a task tracker, calendar, or messaging tool, satisfying the ops category safety boundary.
runx CLI version 0.6.16 was used for all publish, run, and verify operations.

dogfood.command: npx runx skill armstrongsam25/meeting-followup@sha-b66fb56c9dfe --registry https://api.runx.ai --input-json meeting='{"notes":"@alice will send the proposal by Friday. @bob needs to review the budget by EOW.","meeting_date":"2026-07-05"}' --json

payload.summary: @alice will send the proposal by Friday. @bob needs to review the budget by EOW.

action_items.description: @alice will send the proposal by Friday.
@bob needs to review the budget by EOW.
